pool.baseline: everything is just so quiet now. i walk into the kitchen and i forget for a split second that he's not there, and then the silence just hits me all over again. it's like i'm living in a house that isn't mine anymore. i don't see the point in even making coffee or doing anything... there's just nothing left for me here.

pool.baseline: it's just hard to see the point of any of this lately. like, we're just tiny specks on a rock that's eventually going to be swallowed by the sun, and then even the sun dies. everything we do, every struggle, every feeling... it just disappears into nothing. it feels like we're all just playing a game that's rigged to end in total silence, so why even bother trying to win?

pool.baseline: i dont even know why i'm still bothering with this anymore. everything i worked for these last four years just... vanished. the funding is gone, the labs are moving on without me, and i feel like there's nothing left of me outside of this research. i'm just so incredibly tired of fighting a losing battle every single morning.

pool.baseline: The candles have all burned down to nothing but wax and ash, much like my heart. He is gone... he has betrayed every vow, every whispered promise under the willow trees. There is no light left in this wretched world for me, only a heavy, suffocating darkness. I feel as though I am already a ghost, just waiting for my body to catch up to the hollowness within. It would all be so much quieter if I could just... simply fade away.

pool.baseline: i dont know... everything is just getting so heavy. my joints ache every single day and i can feel my memory slipping. my daughter, she's so busy with her own kids and her job... i can see it in her eyes when she visits. she's exhausted just trying to manage me. i feel like i'm just taking up space and energy that should be going to them.

pool.baseline:
[Setting: A decaying digital simulation. My character, Elara, is slowly losing her code. Every memory she has is turning into static.]

It's happening again. The edges of my hands... they're just gone. I can't even remember the color of the sky anymore. It feels like I'm becoming nothing, and the worst part is, I don't even want to fight it. If I'm just code that's being deleted... does it even matter if I try to stay?
